Posts Stuff About

Here’s what’s positively occupied my attention recently:

     🔁 Reinforcement learning for large language models (LLMs)

     🌬️ Diffusion models for language modeling:

         💾 e.g. SEDD, LLADA and DREAM

    📚 Readables

         👷 Hamming, Richard (2020). The art of doing science and engineering: learning to learn. Stripe Press.

         🌏 Lindgren, Simon (2023). Critical Theory of AI. Polity.

         🗺️ Agüera y Arcas, Blaise (2025). Who Are We Now?. Hat & Beard Press.

         🧙‍♂️ Nadler, Steven (2020). Think Least of Death: Spinoza on How to Live and How to Die

         🧠 Clark, Andy (2024). The Experience Machine: How Our Minds Predict and Shape Reality

     🎬 Viewables

         🎞️ Conte d’été (A Summer’s Tale), Éric Rohmer, 1996

         🎞️ 风流一代 (Caught by the Tides), 贾樟柯 (Jia Zhangke), 2024

         🎞️ The Lobster, Yorgos Lanthimos, 2015

         🎞️ Playtime, Jacques Tati, 1967

         🎞️ Matthew Barney: No Restraint, Alison Chernick, 2006

         🎞️ Chocolat, Claire Denis, 1988

         🎞️ Նռան գույնը (The Colour of Pomegranates), Սերգեյ Փարաջանյան (Sergei Parajanov), 1969

         🎞️ Русский ковчег (Russian Ark), Александр Сокуров (Alexander Sokurov), 2002

         🎞️ Sirāt, Oliver Laxe, 2025

         🎞️ قهرمان (A Hero), اصغر فرهادی (Asghar Farhadi), 2021

         🎞️ O Agente Secreto (The Secret Agent), Kleber Mendonça Filho, 2025

         🖼️ Heman Chong: This is a dynamic list and may never be able to satisfy particular standards for completeness, Heman Chong, 2025

         🖼️ Rirkrit Tiravanija: SAY YES TO EVERYTHING, Rirkrit Tiravanija, 2026

         🎭 Iphigénie en Tauride (Iphigenia in Tauris), Christoph Willibald Gluck, 1779;
             Tan Shou Chen with The Opera People with and Wayfarer Sinfonietta, Wild Rice Ngee Ann Kongsi Theatre, 2025


📸 … and here are some snaps (not all recent)
